q: Tell me about a time you improved the performance of a system under load.
Describe a disagreement with a teammate on a technical decision and how you resolved it.
Tell me about a time you had to give difficult feedback to a report.
Walk me through a project you're most proud of and your specific contribution.
Given an array of integers, return the length of the longest subarray whose sum equals k. Explain your approach and complexity.
How would you detect a cycle in a singly linked list? Give the algorithm and its time/space complexity.
Design a rate limiter for an API endpoint. What algorithm would you use and why?
You have a slow SQL query joining three large tables. Walk me through how you'd diagnose and fix it.
Design a URL shortener that handles 10k writes/sec and 100k reads/sec. Cover storage, ID generation, and caching.
Design the notification system for a social app (push, email, in-app) that must not double-send. Discuss delivery guarantees.
How would you design a job queue that guarantees at-least-once processing and survives worker crashes?
Design a real-time leaderboard for a game with 50M users. Cover ranking, updates, and read latency.
Why do you want to work here, and how does your background fit this role?
What do you think is the hardest technical challenge a company at our scale faces, and how would you approach it?
Explain the difference between optimistic and pessimistic locking, and when you'd choose each.
What is the CAP theorem, and how does it inform database choice for a payments system?
